LEFT JOIN [Shops] AS [s] ON [a].[Id] = [s].[SellerId]
WHERE [a].[Id] = '44444444-4444-4444-4444-444444444444'

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[AppUserId], [s0].[Id], [s0].[CartId], [s0].[Count], [s0].[Price], [s0].[ProductId]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [s].[Id], [s].[AppUserId]
    FROM [ShoppingCarts] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[AppUserId] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ShoppingCartItems] AS [s0] ON [t].[Id] = [s0].[CartId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id]
